title: Funny Christmas Cards Pack, 36 Small Cute Xmas Cards Box with 6 Festive Mice Designs 10×10cm, Personalised Family Christmas Cards Set with Envelopes, Assorted Multipack Gift Cards for Friends
features: COMPLETE KIDS CHRISTMAS CARDS PACK –This mini Christmas cards pack includes 36 small Xmas cards (100×100mm) featuring 6 adorable festive mice designs, with 36 matching white envelopes (105×105mm) which feature self-sealing gummed adhesive—just moisten to activate for secure closure. No glue sticks needed!

FUNNY & CUTE DESIGNS CHRISTMAS CARD PARK –This assorted multipack Christmas cards set features six adorable mice characters with classic holiday scenes—great as traditional Christmas cards pack for kids or adults. Each small Christmas card perfect for sending warm wishes or a thank you card this festive season.

MERRY CHRISTMAS CARDS INSIDE – Each personalised Christmas cards includes a “Merry Christmas” greeting inside, leaving enough blank space for you to personalise your message. Each individual Christmas card is easy to write on with any pen or pencil—ideal for personalised Christmas cards or money cards for Christmas gifts.

PREMIUM QUALITY & ECO-FRIENDLY – Assorted Christmas cards made of thick white card with vivid colour printing and 100% paper packaging—no plastic. Each box of Christmas cards is fully recyclable and biodegradable, combining premium quality with a sustainable, planet-friendly design. A perfect multipack Christmas cards set to share warm wishes with family, friends or colleagues.

PERFECT FOR FAMILY & FRIENDS –From mom Christmas cards to niece Christmas cards, this festive card set suits everyone. Whether you're looking for funny xmas cards, kids christmas cards, luxury christmas cards, cute vintage Christmas cards, animal Christmas cards or assorted xmas cards packs, these funny multipack Christmas cards brings joy to every Christmas moment.
description: Product Description AMLOOPH Mice Christmas Cards Pack Bring You Various Surprises! Funny Christmas cards for your family The Christmas cards funny brings joy to every Christmas moment. 6 design family christmas cards, 6 pieces each, total 36 pack of Christmas cards (100×100mm). 36 matching white envelopes (105×105mm) included. Vintage Cute Christmas Cards with Self-adhesive Envelopes - Non-sticky when dry, becomes sticky when exposed to water. Each small Christmas cards perfect for sending warm wishes or a thank you card this festive season.
